title: Can Monday.com be integrated with createsend.ie to send an email newsletter?
excerpt:
Hey there 
I wanted to know how I can efficiently send a newsletter from monday.com? I have an existing account on createsend.ie and have sent newsletters form there and now, using monday.com, would like to integrate two…

posts.author: MariaGurova (Maria)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there
I wanted to know how I can efficiently send a newsletter from monday.com? I have an existing account on createsend.ie and have sent newsletters form there and now, using monday.com, would like to integrate two experiences. Thanks, Maria
